decisions.rationale: The observation already resolves to base_record_id project_nostrand-rogers-sbs-201110, which is an existing registry record with identical payload (same project_name 'Nostrand / Rogers SBS', same status 'proposed - final design in progress', same description, boroughs, and source 201110_nostrand_cb15_slides). The closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, so per the decision rule this is 'new' — the observation already points to its correct identity. Meanwhile, registry record project_nostrand-rogers-sbs represents the same real-world B44/Nostrand-Rogers SBS project and already includes project_nostrand-rogers-sbs-201110 as an alias, confirming identity equivalence.

proposed_relations.description: Same real-world Select Bus Service project: Nostrand/Rogers Avenues SBS from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay, replacing B44 Limited. project_nostrand-rogers-sbs aliases project_nostrand-rogers-sbs-201110 and both reference the same source (201110_nostrand_cb15_slides).

evidence_refs.source_quote: Nostrand / Rogers SBS — Proposed Select Bus Service
